message:
fix: prevent render stalls by deleting old images on reset/tab switch

- Delete old content and cursor images before resetting IDs to prevent
  terminal memory exhaustion (root cause of render stalls)
- Reset image IDs on reload (Ctrl+R), tab switch, and resize
- Add u32 overflow protection for image ID counter
- Increase first frame timeout from 1s to 3s
- Add diagnostic logging for render stalls (TERMWEB_DEBUG=1)
- Update README to use npx termweb@latest

files.patch:
@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/192411f7-ac5e-44b1-a09c-1d070ef85c3f
 
 ```bash
 # Run directly with npx
-npx termweb open https://example.com
+npx termweb@latest open https://example.com
 
 # Or install globally
 npm install -g termweb
